creator: dgeo@centrale-med.fr
text:
I can confirm here: upgrading from 4.5 to any < 4.8 doesn't trigger this, but 4.8 fails to expand %U (in a share's "root command" here)

Saw nothing relevant in https://www.samba.org/samba/history/samba-4.8.0.html nor in samba's bugzilla…

Sorry I didn't had time to debug more…
